product_name: Resmed Aircurve 10 V Auto BiPAP Machine-Tripack

images.alt: Resmed Aircurve 10 V Auto BiPAP Machine-Tripack
Resmed Aircurve 10 V Auto BiPAP Machine-Tripack

description_text:
Resmed Aircurve 10 Vauto Features:


	It has an EPR or expiratory pressure relief system which lowers the pressure while exhalation so that patient can easily breathe and doesn’t face any difficulty in breathing against the pressure.
	The machine has an auto-ramp function which ensures that the air pressure does not interrupt the patient when a person is trying to fall asleep.
	The machine has Ti control which monitors the pattern of inhalation and exhalation and prevents cycling by setting a minimum and maximum time limit on inspiration. When the machine detects the user's breathing which falls outside the machine settings, it will intervene to alter the timing of the delivered inhalation or exhalation pressure.
	The machine has a leak management element, and optional spo2 monitoring and operates quietly.
	There are no chances of nasal and throat dryness when you use it alongside the heated humidifier and heated tube, thus providing additional support to the patient.
	Warranty of the machie is 2 years.


What’s in the box 


	Resmed BiPAP Aircurve 10 V Auto machine 
	HumidAir Heated Humidifier 
	ClimateLineAir Heated Tube
	Power Supply Cable
	Power Adaptor 
	Filter 
	Travel Bag
	SD Card 
	User Manual
